get.summary: Get the setting of an entity

parameters.name: entity
parameters.description: The name of the entity that owns the settings to be retrieved

put.summary: Update the setting of an entity

parameters.name: entity
parameters.description: The name of the entity that owns the settings to be updated

post.description: Runs a SQL query on the `curated` schema and returns the result set.

day.description: The day where route was started

otd.description: The quantity of shippings deliered in delivery window

onTimeDelivery.description: The quantity of shippings deliered in delivery window (in percent)

item_categories.description: OMS item categories normalized schema. Includes item/category linkage and timestamps.

category_uid.description: Deterministic category hash (derived from category IDs and platform name).

order_items.description: OMS order items (lines) normalized schema. Includes identifiers, pricing, product references and timestamps.

category_uid.description: Deterministic category hash (derived from category IDs and platform name).

is_removed.description: Flag indicating item was removed from order

order_payments.description: OMS order payments normalized schema. Includes payment identifiers, PSP metadata, amounts and timestamps.

order_rma.description: OMS returns (RMA) normalized schema. Includes return identifiers and timestamps.

orders.description: OMS orders normalized schema. Includes identifiers, channel, status, monetary totals and timestamps.

sales_channel_reference_id.description: External reference identifier of the sales channel

seller_sales_channel_reference_id.description: External seller sales channel reference identifier

skip_picking.description: Flag to bypass picking in fulfillment

external_payment_validation.description: Flag indicating payment validation handled externally (PSP)

automatic_capture_post_picking.description: Flag to auto-capture payment after picking
